comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Observed during npm run gate in extensions/tau while fixing the skill-marker autocomplete crash. Typecheck and lint completed, then test/memory-tool-runtime.test.ts failed in 'keeps newly saved memory out of the active-session system prompt until session_start' with received systemPrompt 'base' instead of expected memory summary hook. This appears unrelated to the skill-marker changes.
